movie.actors: James Spader, Marisa Tomei, Keanu Reeves, Ernie Hudson
movie.plot: David Allen Griffin is a cool killer- time and time again, he chooses a female victim, studies her for weeks till he knows her routine to the smallest detail, makes meticulous preparations ...
movie.title: The Watcher
movie.writer: Darcy Meyers (story), David Elliot (story), David Elliot (screenplay), Clay Ayers (screenplay)
